results.title: Targa Resources AI Adoption Tracker | Larridin | AI Initiative Tracker
highlights:
Targa Resources Corp. is positioned as a beneficiary of the AI and data center boom driving increased natural gas demand [1]. While the company itself appears to have limited direct AI adoption, it has been leveraging technology platforms like Corva's AI-powered energy operations platform for drilling optimization, predictive maintenance, and real-time analytics across its midstream infrastructure [2]. Targa's primary connection to AI comes through serving data centers' energy needs, with the company's natural gas processing and transportation infrastructure supporting the power requirements of AI facilities [3].

...

### AI-Powered Energy Operations Platform Partnership
...
Partnership with Corva for AI-driven drilling optimization and predictive analytics
...
Utilizes Corva's platform for real-time drilling optimization, predictive maintenance, completions guidance, and risk mitigation across well lifecycle operations
...
How is Targa Resources involved in the AI boom?
...
Targa benefits from AI growth through its natural gas infrastructure serving data centers' power needs, with potential for 8.0 billion cubic feet per day of incremental demand by 2030.
...
What AI technologies does Targa Resources use in operations?
...
Targa partners with Corva to use AI-powered platforms for drilling optimization, predictive maintenance, and real-time operational analytics across their energy infrastructure.
...
Does Targa Resources directly develop AI solutions?
...
Targa appears to be primarily a consumer of AI technologies rather than a developer, focusing on leveraging platforms like Corva for operational optimization.

results.title: Financial Planning & Analysis Analyst – Rockwell Career Center | Bauer College of Business at the University of Houston
highlights:
Targa Resources
...
# Financial Planning & Analysis Analyst
...
About the job
...
Position Summary The Financial Planning & Analysis (FP&A) Analyst plays a key role in providing financial analysis, budgeting, forecasting, and strategic insights to support decision-making and corporate financial performance. This position works with senior leadership, accounting, operations, business analysts and commercial teams to drive financial planning processes, enhance business performance, and ensure alignment with the company’s financial goals and objectives.
...
MINIMUM ESSENTIAL SKILLS AND QUALIFICATIONS:
...
1+ year(s) of relevant experience, with a strong preference for candidates with experience in financial planning & analysis and/or the Oil & Gas industry.
...
- Proven experience in financial modeling, budgeting, and forecasting.
...
- Strong knowledge of financial reporting, variance analysis, and performance metrics.
...
- Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel (financial modeling, data analysis, and reporting).
...
- Expertise in Microsoft PowerPoint for developing high-impact presentations for senior leadership and key stakeholders, ensuring clarity and data accuracy.
...
- Ability to analyze large datasets and synthesize financial information for decision-making.
...
PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS:
...
- MBA or relevant professional certification (CFA, CPA, etc.) a plus.
- Experience using ERP and financial planning software (e.g., OneStream, Oracle Cloud, Hyperion).

results.title: Meghan Yee
highlights:
Data Analytics ADP Analyst I @ Targa Resources
...
Analyst Developmental at [Targa Resources](https://www.linkedin.com/company/targa-resources)
...
Howdy! I'm a technology management major committed to connecting people, information, and technology for societal betterment. My academic journey has equipped me with the multidisciplinary perspective, hands-on experience, and practical skills needed to manage information technology effectively and develop IT personnel to meet organizational objectives. My passion for the field was further fueled during my time as a research assistant and data & analytics intern, where I honed my expertise in working with databases and Power BI. I’m continuing my career journey as a data analytics developmental at Targa Resources.
...
### [Targa Resources
...
#### Analyst Developmental (Current)
...
Targa’s Analyst Development Program consists of three different rotations in IT over a three-year-period. I am currently in my first rotation in the Data Analytics department!
...
#### Data Analytics Intern
...
- Gathered raw data and utilized Power BI to create a comprehensive report, enabling end users to efficiently clean up audiences and consolidate employee users into security groups within workspaces, streamlining access management and enhancing security within the Power BI environment.
...
- Complied data source and gateway connections for reports and utilized Excel pivot tables and Power BI to reduce clutter and oversee and manage report gateway connections and data sources
...
- Conducted testing to evaluate the behavior of Power BI Git repository integration with Azure DevOps, enabling effective change management
...
- Developed a dynamic Power BI report that provides managers with a comprehensive overview of employee exception time data consisting of time taken, planned, and lost, as well as available balances and rollover hours
...
Hey guys! I recently finished my 12-week data and analytics internship at Targa Resources in downtown Houston! I had a wonderful experience contributing to more than 4 unique projects, meeting the impressive data and analytics team, and collaborating with them to sharpen my skills and learn more about the different careers in data.
...
Throughout my experience, I got the chance to use Power BI to create dynamic reports in collaboration with HR data and Power BI environment. My projects involved working with data sources, managing report gateway connections, organizing report access, user security groups, and testing Azure DevOps integration. Other than Power BI, I utilized SQL, SQL Server Management Studio, and Excel. These projects allowed me to gain valuable hands-on experience in building comprehensive, data-driven solutions that supported the organization's needs.
...
I want to thank my supervisor Adi
...
la for believing in my
...
, and my
...
Andrew Vu,
...
, Patricia H
...
for strengthening my skills
...
offering unwavering support
...
I'm excited to announce that I have accepted the offer for the IT Developmental Internship Summer 2024 at Targa Resources! I am super thankful for this opportunity and I'm looking forward to elevating my skills and contributing to the Data and Analytics team as I take my career to the next level!
...
alongside talented individuals

Together, we tackled

solutions, and built tools

Power BI just learned how to talk 

Microsoft quietly dropped something big:
...
BI MCP Servers (Preview).
...
You can now let AI agents talk directly to your Power BI semantic models using natural language.
...
This is powered by Model Context Protocol (MCP) — an open standard that lets AI securely interact with tools like Power BI.
...
• Modeling MCP server → for building & managing models
...
• Remote MCP server → for querying data & generating insights
...

On Jan 12th - Jan 13th, 2021, I was given the opportunity to participate in the #HP and #AWS Bot-A-Thon with my teammates Ashley Odstrcil, Loveleen Biju Thomas, and Hima Vadakekara.
 
 
Our team's task was to create a bot that compared and calculate the inaccuracy% of the Statement of Work with the Proof of Execution document using AWS services such as Simple Service Storage (S3), Amazon Lambda, and Amazon Textract.
 
 Although we did not place, we are grateful to everyone who made this event possible. It was a wonderful learning experience and we gained new valuable skills in cloud computing and machine learning. I would also like to give a special thanks to our mentor Arnold Epanda for coaching us and providing guidance when needed throughout the Bot-A-Thon. #HPBotaThon
...
Building Business Capability
...
I wasn’t alone on this journey. I attended alongside my PMO teammates and fellow Business Analysts, Rique Wright, CBAP and Christina Reynolds. We took a “divide and conquer” approach to sessions and workshops, with one shared goal: bring actionable insights and value back to our PMO and Targa Resources. 

A few themes stood out throughout the 4 days of conference: 
🤖 AI is becoming a day‑to‑day partner in BA work
🧠 Agentic AI is gaining traction across organizations
🏗️ Business Analysts evolving toward Business Architecture roles, shaping enterprise‑wide solutions
...
These conversations reinforced why continuous learning matters so much to me. Growing as a Business Analyst allows me to be a better resource, problem‑solver, and technical advisor for stakeholders—and ultimately, to deliver more value.
...
If you attended BBC this year, I’d love to hear your biggest takeaways! #BuildingBusinessCapability #BBCConf #BBC2026 #IIBA #BusinessAnalysis #PMO #ContinuousLearning #ProfessionalDevelopment #AIinBusiness #AgenticAI #BusinessArchitecture #Teamwork #CareerGrowth #Toronto #WomenInTech #BACommunity

results.title: Senior AI/ML Engineer at Jobgether - United State | Visa Sponsorship Jobs
highlights:
# Senior AI/ML Engineer
...
We are seeking a highly skilled AI/ML Engineer to develop advanced AI and ML solutions for the energy and utility sector. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making. The role requires collaboration with cross-functional teams to design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems.
...
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy scalable AI and machine learning solutions integrated into production systems
...
Build reusable Python libraries and engineering components to support ML pipelines, data processing workflows, and AI system development
...
Python AWS Azure GCP Databricks LangChain LangGraph LlamaIndex Hugging Face AutoGen
...
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for an AI / ML Engineer in the United States.This role sits at the intersection of machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making, focused on solving complex challenges in the energy and utility sector. You will contribute to the development of advanced AI and ML solutions that combine predictive modeling, optimization, and generative AI to support critical infrastructure and sustainability goals. Working closely with data scientists and software engineers, you will help design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems that power real-world applications. The environment is highly collaborative and innovation-driven, with a strong emphasis on applied AI, production readiness, and measurable impact. You will work across diverse use cases including forecasting, geospatial analysis, and intelligent decision systems. This is a high-impact role where your work directly supports the modernization and efficiency of energy systems.Accountabilities
...
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy scalable AI and machine learning solutions integrated into production systems.
...
- Build reusable Python libraries and engineering components to support ML pipelines, data processing workflows, and AI system development.
...
- Contribute to the design and implementation of modern AI architectures, including RAG systems, LLM integrations, and agent-based workflows.
...
- Support database design and optimization, including writing efficient queries for large-scale data processing and retrieval.
...
- Translate complex machine learning and AI requirements into structured technical tasks and actionable development plans.
...
- Stay current with advancements in machine learning engineering, generative AI, and AI orchestration, integrating best practices into workflows.
...
- Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Software Engineering, or related field (PhD preferred).
...
- 7+ years of experience building, deploying, and maintaining machine learning systems in production environments.
...
- Strong proficiency in Python, including experience building reusable packages and scalable data pipelines.
...
- Hands-on experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP, including CI/CD and containerized deployments.
...
- Solid understanding of ML system design, MLOps principles, and end-to-end model lifecycle management.
...
- Experience with distributed computing frameworks and relational/non-relational databases.
...
- Familiarity with Databricks and large-scale data processing environments.
...
- Experience working with generative AI frameworks such as LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, Hugging Face, or AutoGen.
...
- Exposure to agentic AI systems, AI orchestration, or LLM-based decision workflows is highly desirable.
...
- Nice to have: experience in the utility, energy, or power sector and strong Databricks expertise.
...
python artificial intelligence ai gcp gdpr aws cloud continuous delivery distributed computing mlops machine learning

results.title: Applied Data Scientist | Hirequorum
highlights:
Applied Data Scientist | Hirequorum
...
# Applied Data Scientist
...
Are you passionate about using data science, artificial intelligence, and advanced analytics to propel decisions? If you are interested in driving meaningful change for a growth focused consumer products brand, this is an opportunity to join the market-leading Delta Faucet Company team as we use analytics to turbocharge strategic insights!
...
Reporting to the Manager of Data Science and Analytics, this role will work with analytics and domain specialists across the business to deliver high-impact insights and data science solutions. You will develop advanced analytical models, experimentation tests, applied AI techniques, and partner with business stakeholders to translate complex data into clear, actionable recommendations that support the company’s growth initiatives.
...
As an Applied Data Scientist within Delta Faucet Company’s Analytics Center of Excellence (ACoE), you will act as an owner of high impact analysis and data science initiatives that support complex, ambiguous business decisions. This role focuses on advanced analytics, experimentation, and applied AI.
...
- Independently lead end-to-end analytics and data science projects, from problem framing through delivery of actionable insights.
- Apply statistical methods, machine learning, and analytical modeling to solve business problems related to growth, customer behavior, market dynamics, and operational efficiency.
- Develop and maintain analytical data models and curated datasets, partnering with data engineering and BI teams.
- Build AI and machine learning solutions that are aligned with business needs.
- Collaborate closely with business stakeholders to translate analytical findings into clear recommendations.
- Present data-driven recommendations to leaders across the organization, including tactical and C-suite.
...
- 4+ years of experience in data science, advanced analytics, or applied machine learning roles.
- 4+ years of hands-on experience applying statistical methods and analytical modeling to real business problems.
- 4+ years of experience using Python for data analysis, modeling, and experimentation.
- 4+ years of experience writing and refining complex SQL queries against large, structured datasets.
- 3+ years of experience partnering directly with business stakeholders to translate analytical findings into actionable recommendations.
- 2+ years of experience working in a modern analytics platform (e.g., Databricks, Spark/PySpark, or similar).
- 1+ years of hands-on‑ experience applying generative AI technologies (e.g., LLM APIs, task‑specific GenAI workflows) in an enterprise analytics environment.
...
- Bachelor’s degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, Data Science, Economics
...
quantitative field.
...
- 2+ years of experience with analytics engineering and data modeling, including building reusable, well-documented analytical datasets; familiarity with medallion architecture (bronze/silver/gold) preferred.
- 1+ years of experience with model monitoring, experiment tracking, and model evaluation in production settings.
- 1+ years of experience with conjoint analysis or other stated-preference research methods.

- Index Analytics is seeking a Data Scientist to support Government clients in the Baltimore and Washington D.C. Metro Area. This resource will create value from structured and unstructured data by applying domain knowledge, statistical analysis, and advanced machine learning techniques to solve complex healthcare challenges.

- 
-
